name: rateloop
description: Use RateLoop for privacy-bounded human assurance and OAuth-protected workspace review policies.

interface.shortDescription: Human assurance and workspace review policies
interface.longDescription: RateLoop gives Codex a privacy-bounded workflow for preparing human review of public, synthetic, or redacted AI-enabled work. A separate OAuth-protected workspace connection lets an installed agent claim one single-use connection message, load its bound policy, and verify readiness without receiving a bearer credential in chat.
defaultPrompt: Connect this agent to my RateLoop workspace
Prepare human assurance for this public AI workflow
Review this redacted output with a human panel
